utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. All items are fully specified per the requested level of detail.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item from the final package to the corresponding item name in the ground-truth ratings and return the exact rating numbers.
